_note: Caption style presets for build_captions.py. Mechanics modeled on top clipping accounts: bold display font, 2-4 words on screen at once, the currently-spoken word highlighted, thick outline for legibility over any footage, lower-third placement. Colors are #RRGGBB; build_captions.py converts them to ASS &HBBGGRR&. 'highlight' may be the literal string 'theme_gold' to pull brand/theme.json colors.gold.

hormozi.description: Classic viral look: UPPERCASE, white words, active word in yellow, fat black stroke.

brand.description: Same mechanics as hormozi but the active word uses the brand gold from theme.json.

clean.description: Minimal sentence-level captions, no per-word highlight. Good for talking-head explainers.
